task_completion.description: Verify the source shapefile is loaded into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'ne_110m_populated_places_simple' should be visible in the Layers panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the tool to select features by expression.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Select by Expression' dialog or similar filtering window is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct population threshold expression is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The expression box contains a formula checking for population greater than 10,000,000 (e.g., "pop_max" > 10000000).

task_completion.description: Verify the features are successfully selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Features are highlighted on the map canvas (usually in yellow), or the status bar/attribute table indicates that 17 features are selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the export dialog is correctly configured for GeoJSON and selected features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Vector Layer as...' or Export dialog is open with Format set to 'GeoJSON', File name pointing to 'major_megacities.geojson', and the 'Save only selected features' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the export process is completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message banner appears indicating the layer was saved, or a new layer named 'major_megacities' appears in the Layers panel.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GIS graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with QGIS or a similar GIS application, not just terminal commands like ogr2ogr.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manually create the output file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) should be seen creating or pasting content into a file named 'major_megacities.geojson'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually performed the selection rather than just exporting the whole dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save only selected features' checkbox must be visibly checked during the export step, or the selection must be visible on the map prior to export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source dataset is 'ne_110m_populated_places_simple.shp'. The population threshold expression must check for 'pop_max' > 10000000. When correctly filtered, exactly 17 features should be selected. The expected output format is GeoJSON, saved to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/major_megacities.geojson'.
